
### logged into facebook? (1) 


* <code>https://www.facebook.com/login.php?next=<i>URL</i></code>
* login page if <em>you are not logged in</em>
* otherwise redirects to <i>URL</i>


### logged into facebook? (2)  {.smaller}



* <code>https://www.facebook.com/favicon.ico</code> is an image
* load via conditional redirect:
 
```html
<img src="http://www.facebook.com/login.php?next= https%3A//www.facebook.com/favicon.ico"
    onload="doLoggedInStuff()"
    onerror="doNotLoggedInStuff()">

```
 

* with third-party cookies enabled… (more later)
* would work/not work depending on if logged into facebook
 [via <code>https://robinlinus.github.io/socialmedia-leak/</code>]{.mycredit}
